name: CodeSignal Technical Assessment REST API
what_it_does: CodeSignal technical assessment REST API for engineering recruiters, HR teams, and talent acquisition platforms to administer coding assessments, technical interviews, and skills-based evaluations — enabling automated engineering candidate screening, automated code review, industry coding interview standardization, and talent benchmarking through CodeSignal's platform with 1.5M+ developer profiles and industry-standardized Coding Score. Enables AI agents to manage assessment administration for coding test invitation and completion tracking automation, handle candidate results for assessment score and performance analytics automation, access coding test library for assessment question and template management automation, retrieve benchmark data for candidate performance benchmarking automation, manage technical interview for live coding interview scheduling automation, handle screening workflow for engineering candidate funnel automation, access score report for detailed assessment result and code quality automation, retrieve industry benchmark for Coding Score and skill percentile automation, manage certification for developer skill credential verification automation, and integrate CodeSignal with ATS (Greenhouse, Lever, Workday), Slack, and HR platforms for engineering hiring automation.
use_cases: Administering automated coding assessments for engineering candidate screening automation agents
Tracking candidate assessment completion and scoring for recruiting funnel automation agents
Benchmarking candidate Coding Scores against industry percentiles for hiring decision automation agents
Integrating technical assessment results with ATS for engineering hiring workflow automation agents
not_for: Non-technical skill assessment (CodeSignal specializes in coding/engineering, not soft skills or management assessment)
Consumer coding education (CodeSignal is B2B hiring assessment, not consumer learning platform)
Academic coursework grading (CodeSignal is recruiting-focused, not academic LMS assessment)
best_when: An engineering recruiting team, HR function, or talent platform wanting AI agents to automate coding assessment administration, candidate screening, technical skill benchmarking, and ATS integration through CodeSignal's standardized technical assessment platform.
avoid_when: ASSESSMENT FAIRNESS REQUIRES PROCTORING: CodeSignal assessments without proctoring may have integrity concerns; automated unproctored assessment assumption creates cheating_risk for high-stakes roles; automated must implement CodeSignal proctoring for security-critical assessments. CODING SCORE IS CODESIGNAL-PROPRIETARY: CodeSignal Coding Score is a proprietary metric; automated universal coding benchmark assumption creates metric_incomparability with other assessment platforms; automated must educate stakeholders on CodeSignal Coding Score methodology. INTEGRATION WITH ATS VARIES: CodeSignal ATS integration depth varies by ATS; automated uniform ATS integration assumption creates limited_data_sync for ATS without deep CodeSignal integration; automated must verify ATS integration capabilities before automating assessment workflows. CANDIDATE EXPERIENCE AFFECTS COMPLETION: Poorly configured assessment experience reduces completion rates; automated engagement-agnostic assumption creates high_abandonment for overly long or irrelevant assessments; automated must optimize assessment length and relevance for candidate experience.

auth.notes: CodeSignal uses API key + OAuth2 for assessment REST API. REST API with JSON. San Francisco, CA HQ. Founded 2015 by Tigran Sloyan and Sophia Baik (as CodeFights). Products: Certify (standardized assessment), Screen (custom assessments), Interview (live coding), Develop (upskilling). 1.5M+ developer profiles. 1,800+ companies. Competes with HackerRank, Codility, and iMocha for technical assessment.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Demo for qualified companies; production requires CodeSignal subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription by assessment volume; Certify, Screen, Interview module pricing; enterprise custom
pricing.notes: San Francisco CA. Annual subscription. 1,800+ companies. 1.5M+ developers. Engineering hiring focus.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; assessment and candidate APIs throttled per plan tier

known_agent_gotchas: ASSESSMENT INVITATION LINKS ARE CANDIDATE-SPECIFIC: CodeSignal assessment links are generated per candidate; automated generic link assumption creates shared_link for multiple candidates, invalidating results; automated must generate individual candidate invitation links

WEBHOOK IS REQUIRED FOR COMPLETION TRACKING: CodeSignal assessment completion triggers webhook; automated polling assumption creates delayed_notification for assessment completion; automated must implement webhook endpoint for real-time completion notification

CODING SCORE REQUIRES CERTIFY PRODUCT: Industry Coding Score is only from CodeSignal Certify (standardized test); automated any-assessment coding score assumption creates score_type_mismatch for custom Screen assessments; automated must use Certify for industry-comparable Coding Score

CANDIDATE DATA IS GDPR-SENSITIVE: Assessment results are personal data under GDPR; automated unrestricted retention assumption creates GDPR_violation for long-term candidate data storage; automated must implement appropriate data retention and deletion policies

ATS INTEGRATION REQUIRES WEBHOOK CONFIGURATION: ATS data sync requires webhook configuration per ATS; automated auto-sync assumption creates missing_ats_push without webhook setup; automated must configure CodeSignal webhooks pointing to ATS endpoints
agent_readiness.security_notes: Technical assessment. GDPR, CCPA, SOC2. OAuth2. US/EU. Candidate assessment and coding performance data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Technical hiring. GDPR, CCPA, SOC2. OAuth2. US/EU. Candidate assessment and PII data.
